NMDC STEEL LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Change in Directors/KMP/SMP/Auditor/RTA |SUBJECT: Change in Directors/KMP/SMP/Auditor/RTA
NMDC Steel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Appointment of Mr VIVEK NISHANT NATH as Director (Commercial) of the company w.e.f. July 15, 2026. |SUBJECT: Appointment

VEDANT FASHIONS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 25-Jul-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
